scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/gtk4 build:css && bun run --cwd packages/gtk4-icons build && bun run --cwd packages/adwaita build:css && bun run --cwd packages/adwaita-icons build
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd packages/website build
scripts.check: biome check . && tsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/website tsc --noEmit
scripts.publish:packages: bun publish --cwd packages/gtk-css && bun publish --cwd packages/icon-helpers && bun publish --cwd packages/gtk4-icons && bun publish --cwd packages/adwaita-icons && bun publish --cwd packages/gtk4 && bun publish --cwd packages/adwaita
scripts.publish: bun run build:packages && bun run publish:packages
